headline: AUDIT BY RISK, NOT THE CALENDAR
subheading: Set defensible GMP audit intervals for every supplier and site under ICH Q9.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition expressing risk-based audit scheduling in pharmaceutical quality: an abstract floating dial or gauge sweeping across tiered concentric rings, each ring glowing at a different intensity to suggest high, medium and low risk intervals, with a sleek calendar grid dissolving and reorganising into a flowing risk-weighted curve. Delicate stainless-steel checklist motifs, a faint molecular helix thread, and softly blurred rows of capped glass vials anchor the pharmaceutical context, all under shallow depth of field. The palette is deep navy shadows washed with cool teal and cyan light, lifted by a single fresh-green accent glowing from a status indicator marking a compliant threshold. Brushed-metal and glass surfaces catch gentle reflections under soft directional daylight, premium, sterile and trustworthy, uncluttered negative space for a banner overlay. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
